entry.title: Away In The Night
entry.summary:
Author: Inupi_big_brother_is_sesshomaru

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: It was the first time, in a long time, that Peter felt okay. Like things were going to be okay. Swinging around the city like this, Dick flipping tricks with him, and Jason following close on the ground. Peter’s accepted he’s never going to be able to go home. He’s never going to see MJ or Ned around the city, never going to eat at his favorite bagel place again, never going to be in his city again. His New York. Spider-Man is needed here. And Peters is more than willing to provide, to help. And it isn’t just Spider-Man either, Peter is needed. Peter the man behind the mask is needed and wanted. They want Peter’s worry, Peters love. They want to hear his yap sessions. They want to hear his nerdy explanations. They want to have his back. And Peters wants to have theirs too. The best part is he doesn’t have to choose either version of himself. He can be just Peter Parker, he can be just Spider-Man. It’s a weight off his chest that he doesn’t have to pretend to be anyone to make them happy. Peter is content. He is content where his life is. If it was up to Peter, he wouldn’t change a thing.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: With My Heart on a Trigger
entry.summary:
Author: TrivialCrow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,519Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 100

Summary: Three years ago, bodyguard Jason Todd failed to protect his client—and the man he loved—Dick Grayson, a failure that nearly cost them both their lives. Now, a lie forces them back together when the old threat resurfaces. With Dick believing Jason sold him out for a payday, Jason must protect him while playing the role of a heartless mercenary, confronting not only a hidden enemy but also the devastating consequences of misguided protection.

entry.title: Three Is Greater Than Two
entry.summary:
Author: parkerwritesfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 698Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 7

Summary: Dick didn’t want Tim to get the wrong idea, that his being with Jason meant that Dick and Tim couldn’t also happen. He needed to dispel that notion fast. He needed to show Tim how much he liked him, how much he wanted, needed him.Dick and Jason are secretly fucking. Each of them, in turn, starts seeing Tim, too, who has known all along, and all three end up on a collision course headed towards the bedroom.

entry.title: a shrike to your sharp and glorious thorn
entry.summary:
Author: Faye_Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,002Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 35

Summary: Ric may have forgotten her name, but he knows her, somewhere in the marrow of his bones, branded into his very soul, and even the bullet couldn't carve all of her away. Ric knows that she belongs to him and he belongs to her, and it feels like he is taking his first real breath since the hospital.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 160,612Chapters: 59/?Kudos: 355

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: A rare normal night
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,571Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Jason turned to look at him, green eyes catching the faint glow of the dashboard. “Who told you to spam me with texts? ‘Just come for dinner, no explosions, I swear’—I almost thought you were gonna get down on your knees and beg.” Dick laughed, the wheel wobbling slightly before he steadied it. “That was heartfelt pleading, thank you very much.” “Heartfelt my ass,” Jason muttered, but his heart had gone soft. He reached over and gave Dick’s thigh a light smack. “Eyes on the road, drunkard. Don’t send us both to the hospital.”

entry.title: Blind Faith
entry.summary:
Author: dreamingvanity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 254,922Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 234

Summary: It's no one's fault but his own that Dick is sitting there now, cold and utterly miserable, and very close to freezing to death. It's no one's fault but his own that he let his heart and mind get away again. It's no one's fault but his own that he wanted for someone who couldn't and wouldn't be his, and Wally is right. Dick needs to get back to his life, start over and make new friends. That's all, nothing more and nothing less. Friends, Dick needs friends, and sadly (according to Wally), Krypto isn't enough.

entry.title: A Little Love
entry.summary:
Author: Inupi_big_brother_is_sesshomaru

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Dick isn’t really sure what do. On one hand, generally one would tell Bruce about the Brainwashed assassin whose been following him. On the other, Dick really doesn’t want to tell Bruce about said Assassin. Now Dick would’ve told Bruce about said Assassin when he could, but he was found in bludhaven. Therefore, this makes it Dick’s problem not Bruces. Not that he’d call the assassin a problem. Actually he’s been pretty helpful.When Dick first came across him, he’d been hanging around the alleys like an abandoned doll. The assassin didn’t talk much either. Now, whatever Dick had done, it caused him to start following Dick around like a lost puppy. But Dick couldn’t deny he was helpful. And it was nice, having someone to come home to at the end of the day, even if he didn’t talk much.But of course, everything always has to turn into a shit show. Jason just had to break into his apartment. Usually Dick would be all over that and incredibly happy Jay chose to come see him of his own will. But it set the assassin off so of course their was a brawl, now his furniture is broken, Jay’s yelling at him about keeping strays in his house, and his poor roomie is keeping silent. So here is Dick’s dilemma, what does he do now?

entry.title: Glass Rain
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 242,618Chapters: 53/54Kudos: 1,903

Summary: Jason Todd wakes up in the wrong Gotham. Here, he stayed dead. Here, his death broke his family so completely they became the monsters they once fought. Dick Grayson haunts the skyline with wings and talons, Barbara Gordon moves like a spider made of shadow, and something that might have once been Batman rules from a corrupted cave. The city is quarantined, the air tastes of ozone and old blood, and Jason should be running. Instead, he finds himself drawn to the creature that was once his brother—the one stalking him through twisted streets with eyes that still burn with something almost human. Some hunts, it turns out, go both ways.

entry.title: Red wine supernova (fall right into me)
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,742Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: Of course, her body still firmly believed that Dickie was her life partner, but Jason knew better. The princess was just a bait, some kind of poor excuse, so that the Averes at work wouldn't doubt that the royalty they were assigned to actually ended up with them. But Jason had read the rules: there was no way for a knight like her, especially since she was an Averes, to bed with Dickie, and the princess had to be taught this too. So what was happening?Or; Dickie Grayson courts her Averes, said Averes think she's doing it without meaning to. She thinks wrong, of course.

entry.summary:
Author: Whyyyyyyyyfcky

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,044Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 308

Summary: It was supposed to be a harmless wager. A joke. A moment to tease and move on. But something shifts. The air grows heavier, the silences longer.
